homepage.heroSubline: Owens Family Plumbers: Reliable service, expert solutions. Serving San Jose and beyond with pride.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Dedication to San Jose Plumbing
aboutText: Owens Family Plumbers started with a simple mission: provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors in San Jose. Three generations later, we're still committed to that same goal. We've seen it all, from burst pipes during winter freezes to aging infrastructure in Willow Glen homes.

Our approach is straightforward: diagnose the problem accurately, explain the options clearly, and execute the solution efficiently. We value integrity and transparency in every job, big or small. We treat your home as if it were our own.

We're deeply rooted in the San Jose community. We support local schools and organizations, and we're always ready to lend a hand. When you choose Owens Family Plumbers, you're choosing a neighbor who cares.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Plumbing emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle your urgent plumbing needs.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team consists of highly trained and experienced plumbers who can tackle any plumbing challenge.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, upfront pricing before we start any work.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Owens Family Plumbers for fast, reliable service in San Jose and the surrounding areas.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Fast, effective drain cleaning services for homes and businesses in San Jose.
services.description:
Clogged drains are a common nuisance in San Jose, especially with older pipes in neighborhoods like Rose Garden. Owens Family Plumbers offers comprehensive drain cleaning services to keep your pipes flowing freely. We use a variety of methods, including snaking and hydro jetting, to remove stubborn clogs and prevent future backups.

Our experienced technicians can handle any drain cleaning job, from a simple clogged sink to a more complex sewer line blockage. We'll diagnose the problem accurately and recommend the most effective solution. We also offer preventative maintenance services to keep your drains clear and avoid costly repairs down the road.

Don't let a clogged drain disrupt your day. Call Owens Family Plumbers for fast, reliable drain cleaning services in San Jose. We'll get your drains flowing smoothly again in no time.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the clog and identify the cause.
Step 2: Select the appropriate drain cleaning method (snaking, hydro jetting, etc.).
Step 3: Clear the clog and restore proper drainage.
Step 4: Inspect the drain to ensure it's flowing freely.

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your drains cleaned at least once a year to prevent clogs and backups. If you experience frequent clogs, you may need to have them cleaned more often.

faq.question: What is hydro jetting?
faq.answer: Hydro jetting is a drain cleaning method that uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn clogs and debris from your pipes. It's a very effective way to clear even the most difficult blockages.

faq.question: Can I use chemical drain cleaners?
faq.answer: We generally advise against using chemical drain cleaners, as they can damage your pipes over time. It's always best to call a professional plumber for drain cleaning services.

services.name: Water Heater Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert water heater services in San Jose, including repair, replacement, and installation.
services.description:
A functioning water heater is essential for comfortable living in San Jose. Owens Family Plumbers provides comprehensive water heater services, including repair, replacement, and installation. Whether you're dealing with a cold shower, a leaking tank, or simply want to upgrade to a more energy-efficient model, we've got you covered.

We service all types of water heaters, including traditional tank water heaters, tankless water heaters, and heat pump water heaters. Our experienced technicians can diagnose any water heater problem and recommend the best solution for your needs. We also offer preventative maintenance services to keep your water heater running smoothly and extend its lifespan.

With the older housing stock in areas like Willow Glen, water heater issues are common. Don't wait until your water heater fails completely. Call Owens Family Plumbers for prompt, reliable water heater service in San Jose.
process: Step 1: Inspect the water heater and diagnose the problem.
Step 2: Provide a detailed estimate for repair or replacement.
Step 3: Perform the necessary repairs or install a new water heater.
Step 4: Test the water heater to ensure it's functioning properly.

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last?
faq.answer: Most water heaters last between 8 and 12 years. However, with proper maintenance, you can extend the lifespan of your water heater.

faq.question: What are the signs that my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your water heater needs to be replaced include rusty water, leaks, strange noises, and inconsistent water temperature.

faq.question: What is a tankless water heater?
faq.answer: A tankless water heater heats water on demand, rather than storing it in a tank. This can save energy and provide a continuous supply of hot water.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Accurate leak detection services to protect your San Jose home from water damage.
services.description:
Hidden leaks can cause significant damage to your San Jose home, leading to mold growth, structural problems, and high water bills. Owens Family Plumbers offers advanced leak detection services to identify and repair leaks before they cause serious problems. We use sophisticated equipment, such as acoustic sensors and thermal imaging cameras, to locate leaks behind walls, under floors, and in other hard-to-reach areas.

Our experienced technicians can detect leaks in water lines, sewer lines, and gas lines. We'll provide you with a detailed report of our findings and recommend the best course of action. We also offer leak repair services to fix the leak quickly and efficiently.

Given San Jose's location in an earthquake zone, pipe shifting and leaks are a risk. Don't let a hidden leak damage your home. Call Owens Family Plumbers for accurate leak detection services in San Jose.
process: Step 1: Conduct a thorough inspection of your plumbing system.
Step 2: Use advanced leak detection equipment to locate any hidden leaks.
Step 3: Provide a detailed report of our findings.
Step 4: Recommend the best course of action for leak repair.

faq.question: How can I tell if I have a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, water stains on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

faq.question: What is acoustic leak detection?
faq.answer: Acoustic leak detection uses sensitive microphones to listen for the sound of water escaping from a pipe. This method is very effective for locating leaks behind walls and under floors.

faq.question: How much does leak detection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of leak detection varies depending on the size and complexity of the job. We offer free estimates for our leak detection services.

services.name: Sewer Line Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line services in San Jose, including repair, replacement, and cleaning.
services.description:
Sewer line problems can be messy and disruptive. Owens Family Plumbers offers comprehensive sewer line services to keep your sewer system functioning properly. We can handle any sewer line issue, from minor clogs to major breaks.

We use a variety of methods to repair or replace sewer lines, including traditional trenching and trenchless methods. Trenchless methods, such as pipe bursting and pipe lining, can minimize disruption to your property and save you time and money. Our experienced technicians will assess your situation and recommend the best solution for your needs.

With the aging infrastructure in some San Jose neighborhoods, sewer line issues are not uncommon. Don't let a sewer line problem ruin your day. Call Owens Family Plumbers for prompt, reliable sewer line service in San Jose.
process: Step 1: Inspect the sewer line and diagnose the problem.
Step 2: Provide a detailed estimate for repair or replacement.
Step 3: Perform the necessary repairs or replace the sewer line.
Step 4: Test the sewer line to ensure it's functioning properly.

faq.question: What are the signs of a sewer line problem?
faq.answer: Signs of a sewer line problem include sewage backups, slow drains, gurgling noises in your pipes, and a foul odor in your yard.

faq.question: What is trenchless sewer line repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless sewer line repair is a method of repairing or replacing sewer lines without digging up your yard. This can save time, money, and disruption to your property.

faq.question: How much does sewer line repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of sewer line repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the method used. We offer free estimates for our sewer line services.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional fixture installation services for kitchens and bathrooms in San Jose homes.
services.description:
Upgrading your fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your kitchen and bathroom. Owens Family Plumbers offers professional fixture installation services for homes in San Jose. Whether you're replacing a leaky faucet, installing a new showerhead, or remodeling your entire bathroom, we can handle the job.

We install all types of fixtures, including faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and bathtubs. Our experienced technicians will ensure that your new fixtures are installed correctly and that they function properly. We also offer fixture repair services to fix leaky or damaged fixtures.

From modern homes in Almaden Valley to older homes in Japantown, we've installed fixtures in all types of San Jose properties. Call Owens Family Plumbers for expert fixture installation services.
process: Step 1: Remove the old fixture.
Step 2: Prepare the plumbing for the new fixture.
Step 3: Install the new fixture.
Step 4: Test the fixture to ensure it's functioning properly.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a new faucet?
faq.answer: Installing a new faucet typically takes about an hour. However, the exact time may vary depending on the complexity of the job.

faq.question: Do I need to turn off the water before you install a new fixture?
faq.answer: Yes, we will need to turn off the water supply to the fixture before we can install a new one.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right fixtures for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide you with advice and recommendations on choosing the right fixtures for your home.

services.name: Gas Line Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable gas line repair, installation, and inspection in San Jose.
services.description:
Gas lines require specialized expertise. Owens Family Plumbers provides safe and reliable gas line services in San Jose, including repair, installation, and inspection. Whether you need a new gas line installed for a new appliance, or you suspect a gas leak, our certified technicians can handle the job.

We adhere to strict safety protocols and use the latest technology to ensure the integrity of your gas lines. We can also help you with gas line inspections to identify potential problems before they become serious.

Given the age of some homes in San Jose, gas line maintenance is crucial. Don't take chances with gas lines. Call Owens Family Plumbers for safe and reliable gas line services.
process: Step 1: Inspect the gas line for leaks or damage.
Step 2: Repair or replace the gas line as needed.
Step 3: Install new gas lines for appliances.
Step 4: Conduct a thorough gas line inspection.

faq.question: How can I tell if I have a gas leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a gas leak include a rotten egg smell, a hissing sound near gas lines, and dead vegetation near gas lines.

faq.question: What should I do if I suspect a gas leak?
faq.answer: If you suspect a gas leak, evacuate the area immediately and call the gas company or 911.

faq.question: Are your technicians certified to work on gas lines?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our technicians are certified to work on gas lines.

serviceAreas.content:
Owens Family Plumbers is proud to offer comprehensive plumbing services to the residents and businesses of San Jose, California. From the heart of Silicon Valley to the vibrant neighborhoods, we are committed to providing reliable, efficient, and affordable plumbing solutions. Our team of experienced and licensed plumbers is equipped to handle any plumbing issue, big or small. 

We understand the unique plumbing needs of San Jose homes and businesses, from older infrastructure in historic districts to modern plumbing systems in newer developments. Owens Family Plumbers is dedicated to ensuring your plumbing systems function flawlessly, providing peace of mind and protecting your property. We're available 24/7 for emergency plumbing repairs, so you can always count on us when you need us most.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Jose is a large and diverse city with a mix of residential, commercial, and industrial areas, reflecting its status as a major technology hub.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Our water heater died on a Saturday morning. Owens Family Plumbers was at our house in Willow Glen within an hour! They quickly assessed the situation and gave us a fair price for a new water heater. The installation was smooth and professional. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had a clogged kitchen sink that I couldn't clear myself. Owens Family Plumbers came out the same day and snaked the drain. The plumber was friendly and efficient. My only complaint is that the price was a little higher than I expected, but the service was worth it.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We suspected we had a leak somewhere because our water bill was unusually high. Owens Family Plumbers used some kind of fancy equipment to find a small leak in our backyard. They fixed it quickly and saved us a lot of money. Thank you!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Our toilet was constantly running, and we were wasting water. Owens Family Plumbers came out and fixed it in no time. The plumber was very knowledgeable and gave us some tips on how to prevent future problems.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: We had a sewer backup in our basement. Owens Family Plumbers was able to clear the line quickly and efficiently. They were very professional and cleaned up the mess afterwards. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: I smelled gas near my stove and called Owens Family Plumbers immediately. They arrived quickly and found a small leak in the gas line. They repaired it safely and efficiently. I'm so grateful for their prompt and professional service.
